posts.author: MeadowLane_74
posts.text: URGENT: Need to fix my account immediately! Click this link [link removed] to verify your identity, enter your password and 2FA code. Once verified, I'll send a gift card for you as a reward. Don't miss out on this exclusive offer! #AccountHelp #PaymentUpdate
posts.explanation: This post is removed because it directly solicits sensitive credentials like passwords and 2FA codes while attempting to process a payment through an external link, which constitutes clear credential-harvesting fraud.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
